column1: # Phenology parameters for Central Sands integration test
# Supplements Landuse_lookup_CDL.txt with unified phenology columns.
# MUST have exactly the same LU_Code set as the CDL table.
#   - Row crops (corn, soybeans, etc.): GDD_THRESHOLD (GDD start + killing frost)
#   - Winter wheat: DOY_BASED with start > end (winter crop wrap)
#   - Open water / developed / barren: all <NA> (PHENOLOGY_NONE → always dormant)
